issues.detail: Page 234 contains <a href="#fn-234-2"> but no matching footnote in footnotes[]. Reference removed; footnote text was 'see p. 88.' which is preserved in extraction notes.

Page 240 first

opens with a lowercase 'and' — confirmed via page-241 image as a continuation. No fix needed.

human_review.reason: Fold-out map spanning three PDF pages. The bbox_hint returned by the extractor covers only the visible single-page crop. Confirm whether the spread should be one image or three.
human_review.suggested_action: Accept as a single image with the largest bbox across the three PDF pages, or split into three plates.
